sections.title: Technique
sections.default: Erect and supine AP views of the abdomen were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The bowel gas pattern is normal. No dilated bowel loops are identified. No air-fluid levels are seen on erect view. No free air under the diaphragm. The liver, spleen and kidneys are normal in size. No abnormal calcifications are identified. The visualized bones are intact.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No significant radiological abnormality on abdominal radiograph.

few_shot_normal.input: bowel gas normal, no air-fluid levels, no free air, organs normal

output.findings: The bowel gas pattern is normal. No dilated bowel loops are identified. No air-fluid levels are seen on erect view. No free air under the diaphragm. The liver, spleen and kidneys are normal in size. No abnormal calcifications. The visualized bones are intact.
output.impression: No significant radiological abnormality on abdominal radiograph.
